chunks.text: Printing | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Printing Installing printers in Windows This method may work best if your Windows machine is in the EECS Domain (Active Directory), and you have local administrat

(Active Directory), and you have local administrative access. Click the Windows Button and search for “Run”. Click on “Run” to open a “run” Window. Type “\\print.eecs.berkeley.edu” and press OK. A list of all printers on the print server will appear.

t of all printers on the print server will appear. Scroll through and double-click on the printer you want to use, and follow the on-screen prompts to install it on your system. Installing printers in Windows via lpd If you run into trouble with the

Windows via lpd If you run into trouble with the previous method, you can instead install printers using their lpd queue on print.eecs. Which printers can I print to? Printing Services Page Reporting printing problems IDSG does not own or maintain a

printing problems IDSG does not own or maintain any of the public or private printers. IDSG only maintains the print spool servers that can be used to set up the printers. For problems with the printers on the 2nd floor of Soda Hall, please email in

ers on the 2nd floor of Soda Hall, please email inst@eecs.berkeley.edu – the EECS Instructional Group. For the public printers in Soda Hall (lws384 and lws730): For paper/toner problems contact csoffice@cs.berkeley.edu For other problems, contact cop

ce@cs.berkeley.edu For other problems, contact copiers-printers@eecs.berkeley.edu Note: For problems with private printers in Soda Hall, users should contact their local system administrator. Who can help support my printer, or my group’s printer? Fo

help support my printer, or my group’s printer? For simple network, security, and device support (e.g. no toner replacement), our Computer User Support Group has an annual contract option . CUSG can set it up and get it working for you, and become th

et it up and get it working for you, and become the registered security contact for the printer. For general, all-around support that includes toner replacement, we recommend working with the Cartridge Family — “Simply order your toner cartridges fro

e Family — “Simply order your toner cartridges from Cartridge Family and all service, labor and parts are included.” For large-scale office printing, UCSF Documents & Media offers a printer management program to UC Berkeley . Primary Sidebar IRIS Ser

program to UC Berkeley . Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
